    • fromRepr

      public Bloc fromRepr(String repr)
      Calculates how over- or under-represented a bloc is among all Character instances. Ratio of actual membership to expected membership. O(1)
      Specified by:
      fromRepr in interface Repr<Bloc>
      Parameters:
      repr - A Repr-formatted String to parse.
      bloc - The bloc to be evaluated for representation.
      Returns:
      A float value for representation. invalid input: '<'1 indicates the bloc is under-represented, while >1 indicates the bloc is over-represented.
